reviews.review_description:
You can't even open a simple fbx from internal memory
 Its not a viewer at all, it's just a companion app for some seemingly paid external service.
 (Trying to view local files just opens a page which explains: you have to register for an account, give THEM your file, sign up for a "free" 21 day trial, and then "simply" make a scene, and import your file which they now have.)
